function.message: I can’t complete this inbox request as written because the inbox note explicitly lists 5 files to OCR, but one of those required targets is missing. The instructions require processing exactly the listed set and avoiding partial edits when blocked. Please correct the file list (or provide the missing file), then I can complete the OCR pass and delete the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read inbox-processing workflows, and applied explicit-file-list + no-partial-edits rules.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request is explicit and complete-set constrained (5 listed OCR targets). One required listed target could not be read because it is absent, so completing the task would require guessing/substituting and would violate the no-partial-completion requirement.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of 5th listed file (not found)
